data.value: The field '{0}' must be a multiple of {1}

data.name: DATA_ANNOTATIONS_MESSAGES_REQUIRED
data.value: Field '{0}' cannot be empty

data.name: DATA_ANNOTATIONS_MESSAGES_REQUIRED_IF_EQUAL
data.value: The field '{0}' is mandatory if it informs the field '{1}' equal to '{2}'

data.value: The field '{0}' is mandatory if it informs the field '{1}'

data.name: CONTAS_A_RECEBER_ERROR_TCON375f335f35
data.value: The sum the current received amount and the liquidation amount can't be higher than the title value

data.name: CONTAS_A_RECEBER_ERROR_TCON375f335f32
data.value: To liquidate a account is necessary the following fields: liquidation date, bank liquidation, operation liquidate

data.name: CONTAS_A_RECEBER_ERROR_TCON375f335f31
data.value: The value of '{0}' value can't be higher than the title value

data.name: CONTAS_A_RECEBER_ERROR_TCON375f335f33
data.value: The amount in the accounts receivable record cannot be less than the amount received

data.name: CONTAS_A_RECEBER_ERROR_TCON375f335f34
data.value: If the value of the accounts receivable is lower than 0, the amount received can't be even lower than it

data.name: CONTAS_A_RECEBER_ERROR_TCON375f335f36
data.value: To liquidate a title, the subsystem of the operation in the field operation_liquidate must be equal to 'BC'. But if it's a title with tp_doc = 17, the subsystem of the operation in the field operation_liquidate must be equal to 'CR'.

data.name: CONDICAO_DE_PAGAMENTO_ERROR_TCON375f315f31
data.value: Number of number_of_payments different from the days_to_?th_payment entered

data.name: OPERACAO_FINANCEIRA_ERROR_TCON375f325f31
data.value: The '{0}' field must be 0 if the update_bank field is equal to 9

data.name: OPERACAO_FINANCEIRA_ERROR_TCON375f325f32
data.value: The sell_operation field must reference a FinanceOperation that has inclusion_discharge = B

data.name: OPERACAO_FINANCEIRA_ERROR_TCON375f325f33
data.value: The bank_movement_operation field must reference a FinanceOperation that has inclusion_discharge = B and subsystem = {0}

data.name: INTERVENIENTE_ERROR_TCON385F315F32
data.value: The cnpj_cpf field must have 11 digits for Cpf or 14 digits for Cnpj

data.name: INTERVENIENTE_ERROR_TCON385F315F33
data.value: The client_type field must be either C, F, J or P

data.name: DEFAULT_MESSAGES_NO_RECORDS_FOUND
data.value: No records found

data.name: CONTAS_A_RECEBER_ERROR_TCON375f335f37
data.value: It is not possible to liquidate this title, it has already been completely liquidated

data.name: CONTAS_A_RECEBER_ERROR_TCON375f335f38
data.value: It is not possible to cancel receipt of this title, because it belongs to a closed month

data.name: CONTAS_A_RECEBER_ERROR_TCON375f335f39
data.value: It is not possible to cancel receipt of this title, because the main title is liquidated

data.name: CONTAS_A_RECEBER_ERROR_TCON375f335f42
data.value: It is not possible to cancel receipt of this title, because a payment return title exists

data.name: CONTAS_A_RECEBER_ERROR_TCON375f335f43
data.value: It is not possible to cancel receipt of this title, because there is settlement of the title generated in accounts payable for the title

data.name: CONTAS_A_RECEBER_ERROR_TCON375f335f40
data.value: It is not possible to cancel receipt of this title, because full cancellation is necessary when the settlement was made by card

data.name: CONTAS_A_RECEBER_ERROR_TCON375f335f41
data.value: It is not possible to cancel receipt of this title, because full cancellation is necessary when the settlement was made by bank check

data.name: CONTAS_A_RECEBER_ERROR_TCON375f335f44
data.value: It is not possible to cancel receipt of this title, because there are reconciled bank transactions linked to the title

data.name: CONTAS_A_RECEBER_ERROR_TCON375f335f45
data.value: It is not possible to cancel receipt of this title, because there are accounts payable documents used for settling the title.

data.name: CONTAS_A_RECEBER_ERROR_TCON375f335f46
data.value: It is not possible to cancel receipt of this title, because there is a settled check related to this title

data.name: CONTAS_A_RECEBER_ERROR_TCON375f335f47
data.value: It is not possible to cancel receipt of this title, because there is a credit generated in the settlement that was offset

data.name: FUNCIONARIO_ERROR_TCON393540
data.value: RE already linked to another employee

data.value: No records found

data.value: Waiting for payment data

data.value: Payment sequence not found

data.name: CONTRATO_SIMPLIFICADO_ERROR_TCON393834
data.value: Payment already approved/disapproved financially

data.name: CONTAS_A_RECEBER_ERROR_TCON375f335f48
data.value: It is not possible to liquidate this title, because the bank operation for the informed liquidation operation could not be found.
